metadata.name: Security Call Ban Pack
metadata.summary: Prevent dynamic evaluation helpers and restrict access to sensitive sinks.

rules.description: Disallow usage of eval/exec/compile at runtime.
rules.sql:
SELECT fc.path AS path, fc.callee_name AS callee_name
FROM function_calls AS fc
WHERE fc.run_id = %(run_id)s
  AND fc.callee_name = ANY(%(callee_name_0)s)

rules.description: Secrets boundary cannot import utility modules tagged as exfil sinks.
rules.sql:
SELECT ie.source_boundary AS source_boundary, ie.target_name AS target_name, ie.usage_count AS usage_count
FROM import_edges AS ie
WHERE ie.run_id = %(run_id)s
  AND (ie.source_boundary LIKE %(source_boundary_0)s ESCAPE '\\')
  AND (ie.target_name LIKE %(target_name_1)s ESCAPE '\\')

rules.description: Keep secrets boundary lean (<1k SLOC) for easier auditing.
rules.sql:
SELECT bs.boundary AS boundary, bs.module_count AS module_count, bs.total_sloc AS total_sloc, bs.total_functions AS total_functions, bs.total_classes AS total_classes
FROM boundary_stats AS bs
WHERE bs.run_id = %(run_id)s
  AND (bs.boundary LIKE %(boundary_0)s ESCAPE '\\')
